dashboard.label: Video Experience Dashboard
dashboard.definition:
{
	"title": "Video Experience Dashboard",
	"description": "By Kollective Technology",
	"inputs": {
		"input_global_trp": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "-24h@h,now",
				"token": "global_time"
			},
			"title": "Global Time Range",
			"type": "input.timerange"
		},
		"input_location": {
			"type": "input.dropdown",
			"title": "Location",
			"options": {
				"token": "location",
				"defaultValue": "*",
				"items": ">frame(label, value) | prepend(formattedStatics) | objects()"
			},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_location_list"
			},
			"context": {
				"formattedConfig": {
					"number": {
						"prefix": ""
					}
				},
				"formattedStatics": ">statics | formatByType(formattedConfig)",
				"statics": [
					[
						"All"
					],
					[
						"*"
					]
				],
				"label": ">primary | seriesByName("locality_name") | renameSeries("label") | formatByType(formattedConfig)",
				"value": ">primary | seriesByName("locality_id") | renameSeries("value") | formatByType(formattedConfig)"
			}
		}
	},
	"defaults": {
		"dataSources": {
			"ds.search": {
				"options": {
					"queryParameters": {
						"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
						"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
					}
				}
			},
			"ds.spl2": {
				"options": {
					"queryParameters": {
						"latest": "$global_time.latest$",
						"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$"
					}
				}
			}
		},
		"visualizations": {
			"global": {
				"showProgressBar": true
			}
		}
	},
	"dataSources": {
		"ds_location_list": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "location_list",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| dedup locality_id
| fields locality_name, locality_id"
			}
		},
		"ds_reach": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "reach",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| timechart span=1h sum(reach_count) as hourly_reach
| stats max(hourly_reach) as "Max Hourly Reach""
			}
		},
		"ds_views": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "views",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| timechart span=1h sum(view_count) as hourly_views
| stats max(hourly_views) as "Max Hourly Views""
			}
		},
		"ds_avg_qod": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "avg_qod",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| stats sum(eval(qod_weighted_avg * qod_histogram_count)) as total, sum(qod_histogram_count) as count
| eval avg_qod = total / count * 100
| fields avg_qod"
			}
		},
		"ds_avg_qoe": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "avg_qoe",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| stats sum(eval(qoe_weighted_avg * qoe_histogram_count)) as total, sum(qoe_histogram_count) as count
| eval avg_qoe = total / count * 100
| fields avg_qoe"
			}
		},
		"ds_avg_qov": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "avg_qov",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| stats sum(eval(qov_weighted_avg * qov_histogram_count)) as total, sum(qov_histogram_count) as count
| eval avg_qov = total / count * 100
| fields avg_qov"
			}
		},
		"ds_avg_qoen": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "avg_qoen",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| stats sum(eval(qoen_weighted_avg * qoen_histogram_count)) as total, sum(qoen_histogram_count) as count
| eval avg_qoen = total / count * 100
| fields avg_qoen"
			}
		},
		"ds_hist_qod": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "hist_qod",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qod_histogram_counts)
|  `qox_class(qod_histogram_counts)`
| stats sum(poor) as Poor, sum(fair) as Fair, sum(good) as Good, sum(excellent) as Excellent
| table _time, Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent
| transpose
| rename column as "Score Band", "row 1" as "Sessions"
| eval Category = 'Score Band'
| table Category "Score band" Sessions"
			}
		},
		"ds_hist_qoe": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "hist_qoe",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qoe_histogram_counts)
| `qox_class(qoe_histogram_counts)`
| stats sum(poor) as Poor, sum(fair) as Fair, sum(good) as Good, sum(excellent) as Excellent
| table _time, Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent
| transpose
| rename column as "Score Band", "row 1" as "Sessions"
| eval Category = 'Score Band'
| table Category "Score band" Sessions"
			}
		},
		"ds_hist_qov": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "hist_qov",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qov_histogram_counts)
| `qox_class(qov_histogram_counts)`
| stats 
  sum(poor) as Poor, 
  sum(fair) as Fair, 
  sum(good) as Good, 
  sum(excellent) as Excellent
| table _time, Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent
| transpose
| rename column as "Score Band", "row 1" as "Sessions"
| eval Category = 'Score Band'
| table Category "Score band" Sessions"
			}
		},
		"ds_hist_qoen": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "hist_qoen",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qoen_histogram_counts)
| `qox_class(qoen_histogram_counts)`
| stats 
  sum(poor) as Poor, 
  sum(fair) as Fair, 
  sum(good) as Good, 
  sum(excellent) as Excellent
| table _time, Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent
| transpose
| rename column as "Score Band", "row 1" as "Sessions"
| eval Category = 'Score Band'
| table Category "Score band" Sessions"
			}
		},
		"ds_combined_timeline": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "combined_timeline",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| eval qod = round(qod_weighted_avg * 100, 1)
| eval qoe = round(qoe_weighted_avg * 100, 1)
| eval qov = round(qov_weighted_avg * 100, 1)
| eval qoen = round(qoen_weighted_avg * 100, 1)
| timechart span=1h 
  avg(qod) as "QoD" 
  avg(qoe) as "QoE" 
  avg(qov) as "QoV" 
  avg(qoen) as "QoEn""
			}
		},
		"ds_reach_views_time": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "reach_views_time",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| timechart span=1h 
  sum(reach_count) as "Reach" 
  sum(view_count) as "Views" 
  sum(session_count) as "Sessions""
			}
		},
		"ds_location_ranking": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "location_ranking",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| stats max(reach_count) as "Max Hourly Reach"
        max(view_count) as "Max Hourly Views"
        max(session_count) as "Max Hourly Sessions"
        sum(eval(qoe_weighted_avg * qoe_histogram_count)) as qoe_t sum(qoe_histogram_count) as qoe_c
        sum(eval(qod_weighted_avg * qod_histogram_count)) as qod_t sum(qod_histogram_count) as qod_c
        sum(eval(qov_weighted_avg * qov_histogram_count)) as qov_t sum(qov_histogram_count) as qov_c
        sum(eval(qoen_weighted_avg * qoen_histogram_count)) as qoen_t sum(qoen_histogram_count) as qoen_c
        by locality_name
| eval "Avg Hourly QoE" = round(qoe_t / qoe_c * 100, 1)
| eval "Avg Hourly QoD" = round(qod_t / qod_c * 100, 1)
| eval "Avg Hourly QoV" = round(qov_t / qov_c * 100, 1)
| eval "Avg Hourly QoEn" = round(qoen_t / qoen_c * 100, 1)
| rename locality_name as Location
| table Location "Max Hourly Reach" "Max Hourly Views" "Max Hourly Sessions" "Avg Hourly QoE" "Avg Hourly QoD" "Avg Hourly QoV" "Avg Hourly QoEn"
| sort -"Max Hourly Views""
			}
		},
		"ds_app_breakdown": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "app_breakdown",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| stats max(reach_count) as "Max Hourly Reach"
        max(view_count) as "Max Hourly Views"
        max(session_count) as "Max Hourly Sessions"
        sum(eval(qoe_weighted_avg * qoe_histogram_count)) as qoe_t sum(qoe_histogram_count) as qoe_c
        sum(eval(qod_weighted_avg * qod_histogram_count)) as qod_t sum(qod_histogram_count) as qod_c
        sum(eval(qov_weighted_avg * qov_histogram_count)) as qov_t sum(qov_histogram_count) as qov_c
        sum(eval(qoen_weighted_avg * qoen_histogram_count)) as qoen_t sum(qoen_histogram_count) as qoen_c
        by app_names
| eval "Avg Hourly QoE" = round(qoe_t / qoe_c * 100, 1)
| eval "Avg Hourly QoD" = round(qod_t / qod_c * 100, 1)
| eval "Avg Hourly QoV" = round(qov_t / qov_c * 100, 1)
| eval "Avg Hourly QoEn" = round(qoen_t / qoen_c * 100, 1)
| rename app_names as Application
| table Application "Max Hourly Reach" "Max Hourly Views" "Max Hourly Sessions" "Avg Hourly QoE" "Avg Hourly QoD" "Avg Hourly QoV" "Avg Hourly QoEn"
| sort -"Max Hourly Views""
			}
		},
		"ds_overview_heatmap_qod": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "overview_heatmap_qod",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qod_histogram_counts)
| `qox_class(qod_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h sum(poor) as Poor, sum(fair) as Fair, sum(good) as Good, sum(excellent) as Excellent
| fillnull value=0
| eval Time = strftime(_time, "%b %d %H:%M")
| table Time, Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent"
			}
		},
		"ds_overview_heatmap_qoe": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "overview_heatmap_qoe",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qoe_histogram_counts)
| `qox_class(qoe_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h sum(poor) as Poor, sum(fair) as Fair, sum(good) as Good, sum(excellent) as Excellent
| fillnull value=0
| eval Time = strftime(_time, "%b %d %H:%M")
| table Time, Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent"
			}
		},
		"ds_overview_heatmap_qov": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "overview_heatmap_qov",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qov_histogram_counts)
| `qox_class(qov_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
  sum(poor) as Poor, 
  sum(fair) as Fair, 
  sum(good) as Good, 
  sum(excellent) as Excellent
| fillnull value=0
| eval Time = strftime(_time, "%b %d %H:%M")
| table Time, Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent"
			}
		},
		"ds_overview_heatmap_qoen": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "overview_heatmap_qoen",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qoen_histogram_counts)
| `qox_class(qoen_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
  sum(poor) as Poor, 
  sum(fair) as Fair, 
  sum(good) as Good, 
  sum(excellent) as Excellent
| fillnull value=0
| eval Time = strftime(_time, "%b %d %H:%M")
| table Time, Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent"
			}
		},
		"ds_stacked_qoe": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "stacked_qoe",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qoe_histogram_counts)
| `qox_class(qoe_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
   sum(poor) as Poor, 
   sum(fair) as Fair, 
   sum(good) as Good, 
   sum(excellent) as Excellent
| fillnull value=0"
			}
		},
		"ds_pct_qoe": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "pct_qoe",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qoe_histogram_counts)
| `qox_quant(qoe_histogram_counts)`
| `qox_wavg(qoe_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
  avg(wavg) as "Avg" 
  avg(p50) as "P50 (Median)" 
  avg(p95) as "P95" 
  avg(p99) as "P99""
			}
		},
		"ds_dist_heatmap_qoe": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "dist_heatmap_qoe",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qoe_histogram_counts)
| `qox_class(qoe_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
   sum(poor) as Poor, 
   sum(fair) as Fair, 
   sum(good) as Good, 
   sum(excellent) as Excellent
| fillnull value=0
| eval Time = strftime(_time, "%b %d %H:%M")
| fields - _time _span
| table Time Poor Fair Good Excellent"
			}
		},
		"ds_stacked_qod": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "stacked_qod",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qod_histogram_counts)
| `qox_class(qod_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
   sum(poor) as Poor, 
   sum(fair) as Fair, 
   sum(good) as Good, 
   sum(excellent) as Excellent
| fillnull value=0"
			}
		},
		"ds_pct_qod": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "pct_qod",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qod_histogram_counts)
| `qox_quant(qod_histogram_counts)`
| `qox_wavg(qod_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
  avg(wavg) as "Avg" 
  avg(p50) as "P50 (Median)" 
  avg(p95) as "P95" 
  avg(p99) as "P99""
			}
		},
		"ds_dist_heatmap_qod": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "dist_heatmap_qod",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qod_histogram_counts)
| `qox_class(qod_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
   sum(poor) as Poor, 
   sum(fair) as Fair, 
   sum(good) as Good, 
   sum(excellent) as Excellent
| fillnull value=0
| eval Time = strftime(_time, "%b %d %H:%M")
| fields - _time _span
| table Time Poor Fair Good Excellent"
			}
		},
		"ds_stacked_qov": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "stacked_qov",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qov_histogram_counts)
| `qox_class(qov_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
   sum(poor) as Poor, 
   sum(fair) as Fair, 
   sum(good) as Good, 
   sum(excellent) as Excellent
| fillnull value=0"
			}
		},
		"ds_pct_qov": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "pct_qov",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qov_histogram_counts)
| `qox_quant(qov_histogram_counts)`
| `qox_wavg(qov_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
  avg(wavg) as "Avg" 
  avg(p50) as "P50 (Median)" 
  avg(p95) as "P95" 
  avg(p99) as "P99""
			}
		},
		"ds_dist_heatmap_qov": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "dist_heatmap_qov",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qov_histogram_counts)
| `qox_class(qov_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
   sum(poor) as Poor, 
   sum(fair) as Fair, 
   sum(good) as Good, 
   sum(excellent) as Excellent
| fillnull value=0
| eval Time = strftime(_time, "%b %d %H:%M")
| fields - _time _span
| table Time Poor Fair Good Excellent"
			}
		},
		"ds_stacked_qoen": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "stacked_qoen",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qoen_histogram_counts)
| `qox_class(qoen_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
   sum(poor) as Poor, 
   sum(fair) as Fair, 
   sum(good) as Good, 
   sum(excellent) as Excellent
| fillnull value=0"
			}
		},
		"ds_pct_qoen": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "pct_qoen",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qoen_histogram_counts)
| `qox_quant(qoen_histogram_counts)`
| `qox_wavg(qoen_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
  avg(wavg) as "Avg" 
  avg(p50) as "P50 (Median)" 
  avg(p95) as "P95" 
  avg(p99) as "P99""
			}
		},
		"ds_dist_heatmap_qoen": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"name": "dist_heatmap_qoen",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qoen_histogram_counts)
| `qox_class(qoen_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
   sum(poor) as Poor, 
   sum(fair) as Fair, 
   sum(good) as Good, 
   sum(excellent) as Excellent
| fillnull value=0
| eval Time = strftime(_time, "%b %d %H:%M")
| fields - _time _span
| table Time Poor Fair Good Excellent"
			}
		},
		"ds_N8hWD2UO": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qoe_histogram_counts)
| `qox_perc(qoe_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
   eval(round(avg(poor), 0)) as Poor, 
   eval(round(avg(fair), 0)) as Fair, 
   eval(round(avg(good), 0)) as Good, 
   eval(round(avg(excellent), 0)) as Excellent"
			},
			"name": "qoe_timeseries"
		},
		"ds_oirqCBzg": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qod_histogram_counts)
|  `qox_perc(qod_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
   eval(round(avg(poor), 0)) as Poor, 
   eval(round(avg(fair), 0)) as Fair, 
   eval(round(avg(good), 0)) as Good, 
   eval(round(avg(excellent), 0)) as Excellent"
			},
			"name": "qod_timeseries"
		},
		"ds_RrGHU6Iz": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qov_histogram_counts)
| `qox_perc(qov_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
   eval(round(avg(poor), 0)) as Poor, 
   eval(round(avg(fair), 0)) as Fair, 
   eval(round(avg(good), 0)) as Good, 
   eval(round(avg(excellent), 0)) as Excellent"
			},
			"name": "qov_timeseries"
		},
		"ds_jTiu6EPi": {
			"type": "ds.search",
			"options": {
				"query": "| from datamodel:"ECDN_location_performance" 
| addinfo
| where ("$location$" = "*" or locality_id = "$location$")
| where isnotnull(qoen_histogram_counts)
| `qox_perc(qoen_histogram_counts)`
| timechart span=1h 
   eval(round(avg(poor), 0)) as Poor, 
   eval(round(avg(fair), 0)) as Fair, 
   eval(round(avg(good), 0)) as Good, 
   eval(round(avg(excellent), 0)) as Excellent"
			},
			"name": "qoen_timeseries"
		}
	},
	"visualizations": {
		"viz_reach": {
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue",
			"title": "Max Hourly Reach",

				"primary": "ds_reach"
			},
			"description": "Unique viewers in the selected time window. Each viewer counted once."
		},
		"viz_views": {
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue",
			"title": "Max Hourly Views",
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_views"
			},
			"description": "Total viewing sessions. One viewer reconnecting counts as multiple views."
		},
		"viz_avg_qod": {
			"type": "splunk.singlevalueradial",

				"majorColor": "> majorValue | rangeValue(majorColorEditorConfig)"

		"viz_definitions": {
			"type": "splunk.markdown",
			"options": {
				"markdown": "## Metric Definitions

- **Reach** — Unique viewers. Each viewer counted once regardless of how many sessions they started.
- **Views** — Total viewing sessions. A viewer who reconnects or re-joins contributes multiple Views.
- **QoE (Quality of Experience)** — Measures playback smoothness: buffering and stalls during viewing, with a smaller weight on startup time.
- **QoD (Quality of Delivery)** — Measures whether video data transfers completed successfully within two seconds.
- **QoV (Quality of Video)** — Measures visual quality: whether resolution was sufficient for screen size and remained stable throughout playback.
- **QoEn (Quality of Engagement)** — Measures active viewer attention: video visible on screen with audio on or captions enabled during playback.

**Score Tiers:** Excellent 90+ | Good 80-89 | Fair 70-79 | Poor below 70

## How to Read the Distribution Heatmaps

Each heatmap on this tab shows session counts broken down by quality band (Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent) per hour.

- **Rows** — each row is one hour in the selected time window.
- **Columns** — Poor | Fair | Good | Excellent quality bands.
- **Cell values** — number of sessions in that quality band during that hour.
- **Color intensity** — darker cells = more sessions at that quality level. White or near-white = zero or very few sessions.

**What to look for:**

- A healthy event shows the Excellent column consistently darkest across all hours.
- A red or orange Poor column that deepens during specific hours pinpoints exactly when a delivery issue occurred.
- Sudden shifts mid-event (a row that looks different from the rows above and below it) are worth investigating against event timing."
			}
		},
		"viz_definitions_trends": {
			"type": "splunk.markdown",
			"options": {
				"markdown": "## Trends and Analysis — Reference

**Quality Metrics Timeline — Series Key**

- 🟢 **QoE (Experience)**
- 🔵 **QoD (Delivery)**
- 🟡 **QoV (Video)**
- 🔴 **QoEn (Engagement)**

**Reach, Views and Sessions Timeline — Series Key**

- 🔵 **Reach** — Unique viewers in the selected time window.
- 🟢 **Views** — Total viewing sessions. A viewer who reconnects contributes multiple Views.
- 🟡 **Sessions** — Individual player connections. Multiple sessions per viewer may indicate reconnects.

**Metric Definitions**

- **QoE (Quality of Experience)** — Measures playback smoothness: buffering and stalls during viewing, with a smaller weight on startup time.
- **QoD (Quality of Delivery)** — Measures whether video data transfers completed successfully within two seconds.
- **QoV (Quality of Video)** — Measures visual quality: whether resolution was sufficient for screen size and remained stable throughout playback.
- **QoEn (Quality of Engagement)** — Measures active viewer attention: video visible on screen with audio on or captions enabled during playback.

**Score Tiers:** Excellent 90+ | Good 80-89 | Fair 70-79 | Poor below 70"
			}
		},
		"viz_reading_guide_qoe": {
			"type": "splunk.markdown",
			"options": {
				"markdown": "## How to Read This Tab — QOE Distribution

**Stacked Area Chart** — each color band shows how many sessions fell into that quality tier per hour. A healthy event keeps the Excellent (top) band dominant. Watch for the Poor band growing during specific hours.

**Percentile Trends** — Avg, P50 (median), P95, and P99 plotted over time. P50 tracks the typical viewer. P95 and P99 reveal the experience floor for your worst-affected viewers — useful for SLA conversations. A widening gap between P50 and P99 signals a subset of sessions in persistent trouble.

---

**Distribution Density Heatmap** — rows are hours, columns are quality bands (Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent), cell values are session counts. Darker = more sessions at that quality level.

- Read across a row to see how sessions were distributed in a given hour.
- Read down a column to see whether a quality band was consistently present or appeared only at specific times.
- Compare with the stacked chart above: the stacked chart shows proportions, this heatmap shows raw session counts.

---

**QoE note:** Experience scores are primarily driven by buffering and stalls. Poor sessions clustered at the start of an event often indicate slow startup; Poor sessions mid-event suggest a delivery disruption.

**Score Tiers:** Excellent 90-100 | Good 80-89 | Fair 70-79 | Poor below 70"
			}
		},
		"viz_reading_guide_qod": {
			"type": "splunk.markdown",
			"options": {
				"markdown": "## How to Read This Tab — QOD Distribution

**Stacked Area Chart** — each color band shows how many sessions fell into that quality tier per hour. A healthy event keeps the Excellent (top) band dominant. Watch for the Poor band growing during specific hours.

**Percentile Trends** — Avg, P50 (median), P95, and P99 plotted over time. P50 tracks the typical viewer. P95 and P99 reveal the experience floor for your worst-affected viewers — useful for SLA conversations. A widening gap between P50 and P99 signals a subset of sessions in persistent trouble.

---

**Distribution Density Heatmap** — rows are hours, columns are quality bands (Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent), cell values are session counts. Darker = more sessions at that quality level.

- Read across a row to see how sessions were distributed in a given hour.
- Read down a column to see whether a quality band was consistently present or appeared only at specific times.
- Compare with the stacked chart above: the stacked chart shows proportions, this heatmap shows raw session counts.

---

**QoD note:** Delivery scores should be consistently Excellent for a well-configured ECDN deployment. Any sustained Poor or Fair band is a delivery event worth investigating — check the location ranking table for the affected site.

**Score Tiers:** Excellent 90-100 | Good 80-89 | Fair 70-79 | Poor below 70"
			}
		},
		"viz_reading_guide_qov": {
			"type": "splunk.markdown",
			"options": {
				"markdown": "## How to Read This Tab — QOV Distribution

**Stacked Area Chart** — each color band shows how many sessions fell into that quality tier per hour. A healthy event keeps the Excellent (top) band dominant. Watch for the Poor band growing during specific hours.

**Percentile Trends** — Avg, P50 (median), P95, and P99 plotted over time. P50 tracks the typical viewer. P95 and P99 reveal the experience floor for your worst-affected viewers — useful for SLA conversations. A widening gap between P50 and P99 signals a subset of sessions in persistent trouble.

---

**Distribution Density Heatmap** — rows are hours, columns are quality bands (Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent), cell values are session counts. Darker = more sessions at that quality level.

- Read across a row to see how sessions were distributed in a given hour.
- Read down a column to see whether a quality band was consistently present or appeared only at specific times.
- Compare with the stacked chart above: the stacked chart shows proportions, this heatmap shows raw session counts.

---

**QoV note:** Video quality is sensitive to viewer-side bandwidth and screen resolution. A bimodal pattern — Excellent and Poor both present simultaneously — is common and often reflects a mix of high and low bandwidth viewers at the same location.

**Score Tiers:** Excellent 90-100 | Good 80-89 | Fair 70-79 | Poor below 70"
			}
		},
		"viz_reading_guide_qoen": {
			"type": "splunk.markdown",
			"options": {
				"markdown": "## How to Read This Tab — QOEN Distribution

**Stacked Area Chart** — each color band shows how many sessions fell into that quality tier per hour. A healthy event keeps the Excellent (top) band dominant. Watch for the Poor band growing during specific hours.

**Percentile Trends** — Avg, P50 (median), P95, and P99 plotted over time. P50 tracks the typical viewer. P95 and P99 reveal the experience floor for your worst-affected viewers — useful for SLA conversations. A widening gap between P50 and P99 signals a subset of sessions in persistent trouble.

---

**Distribution Density Heatmap** — rows are hours, columns are quality bands (Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent), cell values are session counts. Darker = more sessions at that quality level.

- Read across a row to see how sessions were distributed in a given hour.
- Read down a column to see whether a quality band was consistently present or appeared only at specific times.
- Compare with the stacked chart above: the stacked chart shows proportions, this heatmap shows raw session counts.

---

**QoEn note:** Engagement scores track whether viewers kept video visible and audio on. A bimodal pattern is expected — viewers are either fully engaged or not. Poor engagement early in an event often reflects late joiners; sustained Poor scores suggest content or format issues.

**Score Tiers:** Excellent 90-100 | Good 80-89 | Fair 70-79 | Poor below 70"
			}
		},
		"viz_definitions_location": {
			"type": "splunk.markdown",
			"options": {
				"markdown": "## How to Read This Tab — Location Performance

This table ranks all network locations by Views (descending) and shows all four quality scores side by side.

- **Reach** — unique viewers at this location.
- **Views** — total viewing sessions at this location.
- **Sessions** — individual player connections. Higher than Views indicates reconnects.
- **QoD, QoE, QoV, QoEn** — quality scores for this location. The heatmap overlay colors cells automatically: green = Excellent, stepping through yellow and orange to red = Poor.

**What to look for:**

- Locations with high Reach but low QoE or QoD are your highest-impact problem sites — many viewers affected.
- Locations with low QoEn but healthy QoD and QoE indicate an engagement or content issue, not a delivery problem.
- A large gap between Reach and Views at a location may indicate viewers who connected but dropped before watching.

**Score Tiers:** Excellent 90-100 | Good 80-89 | Fair 70-79 | Poor below 70"
			}
		},
		"viz_definitions_app": {
			"type": "splunk.markdown",
			"options": {
				"markdown": "## How to Read This Tab — Performance by Application

This table breaks down quality scores and viewer counts by video application (Microsoft Teams, Webex, Kollective KCaster, etc.).

- **Reach** — unique viewers using this application.
- **Views** — total viewing sessions via this application.
- **Avg QoD, QoE, QoV, QoEn** — quality scores for sessions delivered through this application. Heatmap coloring highlights which applications are underperforming at a glance.

**What to look for:**

- Quality differences across applications at the same event can indicate app-specific delivery or codec issues.
- An application with low QoEn relative to others may reflect differences in how that platform handles video visibility or audio state reporting.
- Comparing Reach distribution across applications shows which platforms your audience is actually using.

**Score Tiers:** Excellent 90-100 | Good 80-89 | Fair 70-79 | Poor below 70"
			}
		},
